title: feat: remove template admin findings surface for code-agent telemetry
motivation: Admin findings aggregation for security/soc/runtime/code-cleanup agents is template-specific and outside PRD product workflows.

in: Delete `/api/admin/findings` endpoint and associated query logic.
Remove findings summary/sections from admin dashboard UI.
Keep PRD-relevant admin endpoints (CRM/user/tenant/compliance) intact and tested.
out: Removal of unrelated admin capabilities used by PRD workflows.
Large redesign of admin UI beyond this cleanup scope.

acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard no longer renders template findings widgets.
Remaining admin workflows continue to function and pass existing integration tests.
test_plan: Run server admin API tests and adjust coverage for removed endpoint.
Run web tests for admin dashboard and verify findings UI paths are gone.
Manual smoke-test CRM/user/admin settings actions after cleanup.
